language_notice_message: The interface language has been set automatically.
exit_message: You can save your session to continue later.
terms_paragraph1: Before we continue, I’d like to clarify one important thing.
terms_paragraph2:
I am a digital assistant for monitoring your pet’s condition and I do NOT replace professional veterinary care.
I do NOT provide diagnoses or prescribe treatment.
terms_paragraph3: If you notice any worsening of your pet’s condition or anything concerning, it is important to contact a veterinarian as soon as possible.
privacy_paragraph1: To be truly present and helpful, I need to understand your situation and your pet’s condition.
privacy_paragraph2:
I use your data only for this conversation
and do not share it with third parties.
coming_soon_message: Adding other animal types will be available in one of the upcoming versions of the app.
animal_question: What animal would you like to ask about?

breedWarning.title: Breed Matters
breedWarning.message: With it, the assistant can better account for breed-specific predispositions. Without it, the answers will be more general.

continue_without_data_title: Do you want to continue without filling in the data?
continue_without_data_message: This information helps me offer you a better experience.
start_description:
Attention is the first step
toward help
continue_message: You can resume your previous session or start a new one.

about.p1: Mamascota helps structure observations about your pet’s condition.
about.p2: It helps identify which signs are important and what to do next.
about.p3: Mamascota does not provide diagnoses or replace professional veterinary care.
about.signature: Created with care for animals and respect for people.

symptomSelector.title: What have you noticed in your pet?
symptomSelector.hint: Select up to 3 main symptoms you have observed

chat.summary_hint: You can save the summary using the red icon at the bottom left, or by exiting and saving the session.
chat.pdf_not_ready: The consultation is not finished yet. Complete it to generate a report.
chat.pdf_error: Failed to create PDF. Please try again.
chat.ask_confirmation: Please confirm if this is correct or add more details
chat.invite: Can you help me understand what this could mean?

waiting.hint3: Taking the pet’s age into account…
waiting.summary: Please wait, I’m preparing the summary…

onboarding_1_subtitle: I help identify important signs and prepare for a veterinary visit.
onboarding_2_subtitle:
Tell me in your own words.
If you need to pause, you can continue later.
I ask questions step by step so nothing important is missed.
onboarding_3_subtitle: You tell me what you noticed, and I help highlight what matters and organize your observations.
onboarding_4_subtitle: From the dialogue, you can create a clear PDF summary of the medical history to take to the clinic, so the veterinarian can quickly see the full picture.

summary.empty_subtitle: Start a new chat and save it when you finish – it will show up in this list.

settings.remind_hint: We'll set a reminder to check the pet later today.
settings.max_symptoms_hint: Choose how many symptoms can be selected (3 or 5).
settings.clear_hint: This will remove saved sessions and cached data.
settings.text_size_hint: Increase app text size (without changing system size).

pets.title: My pets
pets.breed_hint: Specifying the breed helps us better tailor the guidance for your animal

settings.clear_data_message: All saved sessions and cache will be removed. Continue?
settings.clear_done_message: All saved data has been removed.

pdf.preparing_language: Preparing report in the selected language...
pdf.diary_intro: Here you can keep a diary of your pet’s condition and symptoms. These records will help the veterinarian make a more accurate assessment of the situation.

csv.download_hint: This file may not open with standard applications on your phone. Download it to open later in Excel, Numbers, Google Sheets or OpenOffice on another device.
